auth.added-body: Sign in as usual and pick the organization at login.
auth.added-subject: You have been given access to a new organization
auth.invite-body: Follow this link to set your password and activate your account: {link}
auth.invite-invalid: This invitation link is invalid or has expired.
auth.invite-title: Set a password to activate your account.
auth.invite-weak: The password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.no-access: This account has no access to any organization.
concurrency.field-conflict: This field was changed by someone else.
concurrency.version-conflict: The record was changed by someone else. Reload and try again.
extensions.deprecated-field: The field is being phased out.
extensions.invalid-key: Field keys are camelCase: a lowercase first word, letters and digits only (e.g. machineSerialNumber).
extensions.invalid-option: The value is not among the allowed options.
extensions.key-conflict: The key is already in use.
extensions.missing-label: A label for the default culture is missing.
extensions.read-only-field: This field is owned by a plugin and cannot be edited here.
extensions.retired-field: The field is retired and cannot be changed.
integrations.dead-letter-not-found: No dead-lettered item with that id.
integrations.malformed-payload: The integration payload is not valid JSON.
labels.name: Name
nav.invalid-parent: Only pages can move, and only into a section.
nav.unknown-node: No menu item has this id.

packages.field-conflict: The field {key} already exists with a different definition.
packages.older-version: Version {offered} is older than the installed version ({installed}).
packages.role-conflict: The role {role} already exists with different permissions.
pipeline.ambiguous-extension-target: The operation tracked several records of this type; the custom-field changes could not be attributed to one.
pipeline.field-not-authorized: You lack permission to set the field {field} ({permission}).
pipeline.idempotency-mismatch: The idempotency key was already used with a different request.
pipeline.idempotent-replay: The response was replayed from an earlier identical request.
pipeline.replay-actor-unavailable: The original requester's account is no longer available; the parked request cannot be executed.
roles.invalid-name: Invalid role name (lowercase letters, digits and hyphens).
roles.reserved-permission: The permission {permission} cannot be granted through a role.
rules.evaluation-failed: The rule {rule} could not be evaluated and was skipped.
rules.invalid-name: Rule names are lowercase words joined by hyphens (e.g. big-order-stop).
rules.missing-message: A message for the default culture is missing.
rules.no-target-row: The operation has no single target row — row. conditions need exactly one {entity}Id input
rules.no-writable-fields: This entity has no writable custom fields.
rules.value-required: Value required — use 'is empty' / 'is set' for empty checks.
subscriptions.entitlement-lost: The plan covering this location no longer includes the active add-on {plugin} (at {tenant}); it will be deactivated at the next reconciliation.
subscriptions.not-entitled: Your plan does not include the {plugin} plugin. Upgrade to enable it.
subscriptions.seat-limit: The seat limit ({seats}) is reached. Upgrade for more seats.
subscriptions.seat-overflow: The seat pool is over its limit ({used} of {seats}); no new members can be added until it is back under.
tenants.cycle: Cannot move an organization under its own subtree ({id}).
tenants.duplicate-id: The id {id} is already in use.
tenants.invalid-id: Invalid id (lowercase letters, digits and hyphens; no dots).
tenants.not-in-subtree: {id} is outside the active organization's subtree.
tenants.not-standable: You do not have access to act in this organization.
users.invalid-name: Invalid user name (lowercase letters, digits, dot and hyphen).
